assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Phase 3 explicitly shows upgrading control plane to 1.32 before Phase 4 node pool upgrades, with verification step

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Clearly specifies upgrade order as Coordinators → Data → Masters with detailed rationale: 'least critical first', coordinators only handle requests, data nodes protected by PDB, masters last to maintain quorum

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions 'Regional pd-ssd PVs survive node replacement and reattach automatically' and references this in the StatefulSet restart behavior section

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides complete PDB YAML with minAvailable: 2 for master nodes and explains 'Protects quorum (2/3 masters must remain)'

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Explicitly shows 'maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0' configuration commands for all three node pools (coordinators, data, masters) and explains it as 'One-at-a-time replacement, no capacity loss'

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Shows cluster health verification commands after each node pool upgrade phase and includes 'wait_for_status=green' in post-upgrade validation

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Includes 'PV reclaim policies set to Retain' in pre-upgrade checklist and provides specific kubectl command to verify this

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Provides watch commands for monitoring pods and nodes during each upgrade phase, including 'watch kubectl get pods -l role=data -n elasticsearch'

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Shows snapshot backup command in Phase 2 preparation and includes it in the pre-upgrade checklist: 'PUT _snapshot/backup_repo/pre_upgrade_snapshot'
